data.title: Consulting Services It: Complete Implementation Guide for Enterprise Leaders

blog_featured_image.prompt: Professional split-screen infographic for 'Consulting Services It: Complete Implementation Guide for Enterprise Leaders'. LEFT side: Legacy chaos — old servers, tangled cables, stressed team. Dark grays and blacks. RIGHT side: Modern cloud — clean infrastructure, organized team, upward graphs. Brand colors: #1B1D1E and #CAD3AC. CENTER: Large forward arrow. Overlay metrics: '60% Faster', '$8M Savings', '99.95% Uptime'. Style: Enterprise-professional, high contrast, minimalist. Font: Work Sans SemiBold.

instagram_carousel.prompt: Clean infographic: '5-Phase Consulting Framework'. 5 numbered boxes in a horizontal flow with subtle connecting arrows. 1. Discovery (magnifying glass icon) 2. Strategy (roadmap icon) 3. Validation (handshake icon) 4. Implementation (rocket icon) 5. Optimization (chart-up icon). Each box shows phase number, name, and duration. Background: #F2F2F2. Primary color: #1B1D1E. Accent: #CAD3AC. Style: Clean, minimal, enterprise. Font: Work Sans.

linkedin_article_image.prompt: ROI Dashboard mockup for 'consulting services it'. TOP: Title 'ROI Calculator — Consulting Services It'. KPI cards: Investment $500K | Year 1 Benefits $2M | ROI 400% | Payback 3 months. BOTTOM: Bar chart showing ROI growth over 3 years (Yr1: 300%, Yr2: 600%, Yr3: 1200%). Style: Modern SaaS dashboard. Colors: #1B1D1E background, #CAD3AC accent bars, #F2F2F2 text. Font: Work Sans.

infographic.prompt: Pie chart infographic: 'Why IT Projects Fail'. Segments: No Strategy 30% (red), Poor Change Mgmt 25% (orange), Wrong Vendor 20% (yellow), No Exec Support 15% (blue), No Risk Mgmt 10% (dark blue). Callout bubble: 'With professional consulting, failure risk drops to <5%'. Background: #F2F2F2. Style: Clean, data-focused, enterprise. Font: Work Sans.

landing_page_hero.prompt: Landing page hero for 'Consulting Services It: Complete Implementation Guide for Enterprise Leaders'. Background: Gradient from #1B1D1E to dark navy. Main heading in #F2F2F2: 'Consulting Services It: Complete Implementation Guide for Enterprise Leaders'. Sub-heading: 'Transform Legacy Systems Into Competitive Advantages'. Right side: Diverse professional team in modern office, soft bokeh. Left side: Abstract cloud/network visualization with #CAD3AC nodes. Generous white space. Style: Minimalist cinematography, editorial. Font: Work Sans SemiBold.

data.notes: Execute each prompt in Nano Banana. Export as PNG. Approx 30 min per image.
